name_en: Top-tier Original Replicas Exclusive Real Photos📷【HOBO CARGO Handbag】m12697 Monogram/Spotted Brown (Color Block)
name_cn:
Top-tier Original Replicas Exclusive Real Photos📷【HOBO CARGO Handbag】m12697 Monogram/Spotted Brown (Color Block)
The Hobo Cargo handbag features grained calfskin and Monogram coated canvas, incorporating a generous main compartment, front zip pocket, and open side pockets into a clean design. The adjustable fabric shoulder strap upgrades the carrying experience.
Size: 27 x 19.7 x 34.5 cm
